resources.string: This app is used to calculate estimated laundry costs based on the customer name, laundry weight, and selected service.
Laundry weight must be greater than 0 kg.
Hello, my name is %1$s and I want %2$s laundry service with a weight of %3$s kg. My estimated total cost is %4$s.

LaundryKu is a simple application used to calculate estimated laundry costs. Users can enter the customer name, laundry weight, and choose either regular or express service. After that, the app displays the total payment and the result can also be shared to another app. Created by Athallah Fadhlurrahman.
